name: Fruit Medley Punch
recipeIngredient: 20 oz (2 pk) Frozen Strawberries in syrup
6 oz Thawed Frozen Orange Juice Concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Della Robbia Ice Ring if using, by pureeing strawberries.
2. In a punch bowl, combine the pureed strawberries, apricot nectar, water, lemon juice, and orange juice concentrate.
3. Stir until the sugar dissolves.
4. Slowly pour in the ginger ale.
5. Add the Della Robbia Ice Ring if desired.
